title: Add Date Field Name Property to Metrics for Time-Based Tracking
story: As a business user, I want to define a date/datetime field name for each metric to specify how it is tracked over time, so that I can document the temporal dimension of my metrics.
description:
Add a 'Date Field Name' property to metrics to store the actual field name used to track a metric or event over time.

### UX Requirements
- Help icon with tooltip: "Date Field Name is intended to store the actual field name that you use to track a metric or event over time."
- Field should NOT be displayed in the metrics table
- Field MUST be included in exports (include as hidden column to enable export)
acceptance_criteria: Date Field Name can be set for each metric
Help icon with descriptive tooltip is visible near the field
Field is not shown in the metrics table view
Field is included in PDF/CSV exports
ux_changes: Date Field Name input with help icon tooltip on the metric detail form. Hidden from table but included in exports.
middleware_changes: Updated metric CRUD operations to handle the new date_field_name property.
data_model_changes: New `date_field_name` column added to the metrics table.
implementation_notes: The field is added as a hidden column in the DataTable to enable inclusion in exports without displaying it in the table view.
comment_summary: Developer raised concern about placing the help icon since the field isn't displayed in the table. Implemented the feature on dev for review.
